variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 6196 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 6196 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 6196 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson X770986 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 6196
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson X770986 Air Oil Separator is designed to separate oil from compressed air systems, reducing oil carryover and improving air quality. It enhances system efficiency and protects downstream equipment. Built with durable materials, this separator ensures reliable operation in industrial and automotive applications.
